## PCI ##

## HDAUDIO ##
hdaudioC0D0
  vendor_name: Realtek
  chip_name: ALC245
  vendor_id: 0x10ec0245
  subsystem_id: 0x15582a00
  revision_id: 0x100001
  0x12: 0x90a60130
  0x13: 0x40000000
  0x14: 0x411111f0
  0x17: 0x90170110
  0x18: 0x411111f0
  0x19: 0x411111f0
  0x1a: 0x411111f0
  0x1b: 0x411111f0
  0x1d: 0x41789b2d
  0x1e: 0x411111f0
  0x21: 0x04211020
hdaudioC0D2
  vendor_name: Intel
  chip_name: Panther Lake HDMI
  vendor_id: 0x80862822
  subsystem_id: 0x80860101
  revision_id: 0x100000
  0x04: 0x18560010
  0x06: 0x18560010
  0x08: 0x18560010
  0x0a: 0x18560010
  0x0b: 0x18560010
  0x0c: 0x18560010
  0x0d: 0x18560010
  0x0e: 0x18560010
  0x0f: 0x18560010
